{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/144512455?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/deprrous/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/deprrous/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/deprrous/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/deprrous/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/deprrous", "id": 144512455, "login": "deprrous", "node_id": "U_kgDOCJ0Vxw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/deprrous/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/deprrous/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/deprrous/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/deprrous/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/deprrous/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/deprrous", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41488", "cvss": {"score": 3.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "## Summary

`langchain-openai`'s `_url_to_size()` helper (used by `get_num_tokens_from_messages` for image token counting) validated URLs for SSRF protection and then fetched them in a separate network operation with independent DNS resolution. This left a TOCTOU / DNS rebinding window: an attacker-controlled hostname could resolve to a public IP during validation and then to a private/localhost IP during the actual fetch.

The practical impact is limited because the fetched response body is passed directly to Pillow's `Image.open()` to extract dimensions — the response content is never returned, logged, or otherwise exposed to the caller. An attacker cannot exfiltrate data from internal services through this path. A potential risk is blind probing (inferring whether an internal host/port is open based on timing or error behavior).

## Affected versions

- `langchain-openai` < 1.1.14

## Patched versions

- `langchain-openai` >= 1.1.14 (requires `langchain-core` >= 1.2.31)

## Affected code

**File:** `libs/partners/openai/langchain_openai/chat_models/base.py` — `_url_to_size()`

The vulnerable pattern was a validate-then-fetch with separate DNS resolution:

```python
validate_safe_url(image_source, allow_private=False, allow_http=True)
# ... separate network operation with independent DNS resolution ...
response = httpx.get(image_source, timeout=timeout)
```

## Fix

The fix replaces the validate-then-fetch pattern with an SSRF-safe httpx transport (`SSRFSafeSyncTransport` from `langchain-core`) that:

- Resolves DNS once and validates all returned IPs against a policy (private ranges, cloud metadata, localhost, k8s internal DNS)
- Pins the connection to the validated IP, eliminating the DNS rebinding window
- Disables redirect following to prevent redirect-based SSRF bypasses

This fix was released in langchain-openai 1.1.14.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00158, "percentile": 0.05279}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-r7w7-9xr2-qq2r", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-16T23:00:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r7w7-9xr2-qq2r", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-r7w7-9xr2-qq2r"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41488"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-24T21:16:19Z", "published_at": "2026-04-16T23:00:12Z", "references": ["https://github.com/langchain-ai/langchain/security/advisories/GHSA-r7w7-9xr2-qq2r", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41488", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/langchain-openai/PYSEC-2026-76.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r7w7-9xr2-qq2r"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/langchain-ai/langchain/security-advisories/GHSA-r7w7-9xr2-qq2r", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/langchain-ai/langchain", "summary": "langchain-openai: Image token counting SSRF protection can be bypassed via DNS rebinding", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-06T00:59:02Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-r7w7-9xr2-qq2r", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.1.14", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "langchain-openai"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.1.14"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: langchain-openai: Image token counting SSRF protection can be bypassed via DNS rebinding
